column1: ## Gm mode: DUPLICATION/TRANSFER/LOSS are PER-GENE-FAMILY rates (per gene, per time unit).
## ZOMBI2 comparable regime: D=0.2 T=0.1 L=0.25 O=0.5, initial genome size 20.
## Transfers set to REPLACEMENT (=1) so additive transfer does not grow genomes;
## then per-gene birth = D = 0.2 < death = L = 0.25 -> families do NOT run away.
## Genome-wise events (per lineage, per time unit)
## Extensions (number of contiguous genes per event). g:1 => geometric(1) => almost always 1 gene.
## REPLACEMENT_TRANSFER = 1 -> every transfer replaces a gene in the recipient (no net genome growth).
## Output related parameters. Keep outputs minimal for a fair genome-step timing.
## SEED : If 0, the SEED is chosen randomly
